query: SELECT ds.id, ds.accountId, a.name as accountName, ds.name as scriptName, ds.isActive FROM dialer_scripts ds JOIN accounts a ON ds.accountId = a.id WHERE ds.accountId IN (450002, 390025, 420001) ORDER BY ds.accountId, ds.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT ds.id, ds.accountId, a.name as accountName, ds.name as scriptName, ds.isActive FROM dialer_scripts ds JOIN accounts a ON ds.accountId = a.id WHERE ds.accountId IN (450002, 390025, 420001) ORDER BY ds.accountId, ds.id;
